description: The ProtoFluxOutputListManager component is used to manage a list of outputs on a ProtoFlux visual.

fields.Visual: The ProtoFlux visual this is a part of.
fields.List: The list this is a visual for.
fields.MinElements: The minimum elements allowed for the list.
fields.AddButtonEnabled: The enabled field of the add elements button.
fields.RemoveButtonEnabled: The enabled field of the remove elements button.
fields._elements: A list of slots representing the UIX elements of the list of outputs.
fields.OutputType: The C# Type of the list of outputs for the list this is managing.

methods.AddElement: Called when the add element button is touched.
methods.RemoveElement: Called when the remove element button is touched.
